app.name: Wadjet
app.site_desc: AI-powered Egyptian heritage app — scan hieroglyphs, translate inscriptions, explore landmarks

auth.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to save your progress
auth.signup_subtitle: Create an account to track your discoveries

footer.tagline: AI-powered Egyptian heritage app. Scan hieroglyphs, translate ancient inscriptions, explore legendary landmarks, and learn from Thoth.
footer.eye_tagline: 𓃭 Powered by the Eye of Wadjet

landing.hero_sub: Two AI-powered tools in one app. Decode ancient hieroglyphs or identify legendary landmarks — choose your path.
landing.path_hiero_desc: Scan hieroglyphs from photos, translate ancient inscriptions, browse the Gardiner dictionary, and write in the ancient script.
landing.path_land_desc: Explore 260+ Egyptian landmarks, identify monuments from photos, get AI-generated descriptions, and discover hidden gems.
landing.feat_identify_d: — snap a photo, AI tells you what it is
landing.powered_sub: Both paths share the same powerful AI engine.
landing.ask_thoth_d: Chat with the AI Egyptology guide about anything — hieroglyphs, pharaohs, or history.
landing.ml_models_d: Hieroglyph detector + classifier (171 classes) and landmark identifier (260+ sites).
landing.works_offline_d: Core scanning runs in your browser — no internet needed after first load.
landing.discover_sub: Test your knowledge, discover featured landmarks, and learn a new hieroglyph every day.
landing.quiz_desc: Test your knowledge of pharaohs, pyramids, and ancient wonders. Quick quiz or AI-generated challenges.

hieroglyphs_hub.hero_sub: Scan hieroglyphs from photos, translate inscriptions, browse the Gardiner dictionary, and compose your own messages in the ancient script.
hieroglyphs_hub.scan_desc: Upload a photo or use your camera. AI detects each hieroglyph, identifies the Gardiner code, and translates the inscription.
hieroglyphs_hub.dict_desc: Browse 1,000+ Gardiner signs organized by category. Search by code, transliteration, or meaning.
hieroglyphs_hub.write_desc: Type text and see it converted to hieroglyphs. Pick signs from the Gardiner palette to compose your own inscription.
hieroglyphs_hub.how_sub: Three steps. One photo. Complete translation.
hieroglyphs_hub.step1_desc: Take a photo of hieroglyphs or upload an image.
hieroglyphs_hub.step2_desc: AI detects each glyph and identifies its Gardiner code.
hieroglyphs_hub.step3_desc: Get transliteration and translation in English or Arabic.
hieroglyphs_hub.cta_desc: Point your camera at any hieroglyphic inscription and let Wadjet do the rest.

landmarks_hub.hero_sub: Explore 260+ legendary landmarks — pyramids, temples, and museums. Snap a photo and let AI identify the site and tell you its story.
landmarks_hub.explore_desc: Browse all 260+ Egyptian landmarks — pyramids, temples, tombs, and museums. Filter by era, type, or location. Each site includes rich AI-generated descriptions.
landmarks_hub.identify_desc: Upload or snap a photo of any Egyptian landmark. The AI identifies which monument it is and tells you its history, significance, and fun facts.
landmarks_hub.count_sub: From the Great Pyramids to the temples of Luxor — every site awaits.
landmarks_hub.cta_desc: Snap a photo of any Egyptian monument and let Wadjet identify it instantly.

scan.meta_desc: Upload a photo of hieroglyphs and watch AI detect, identify, and translate each ancient symbol step by step.
scan.title: Scan
scan.subtitle: Upload a photo or use your camera to identify and translate ancient Egyptian writing.
scan.upload_formats: JPEG, PNG, or WebP — max 10 MB
scan.translation_notice: Translation requires an internet connection and Gemini API access. Detection and transliteration work offline.
scan.no_glyphs_desc: The AI didn't detect any hieroglyphs in this image. Try a photo with clear, visible hieroglyphic inscriptions.

dictionary.meta_desc: Browse 1000+ hieroglyphic signs from the Gardiner Sign List — organized by category, searchable, with transliteration and meanings.
dictionary.title: Gardiner
dictionary.subtitle_post: hieroglyphic signs — or start learning from the alphabet up.
dictionary.search_placeholder: Search by code, transliteration, or description...
dictionary.learn_sub: A complete beginner's journey through the ancient Egyptian writing system — from the alphabet to reading real inscriptions.
dictionary.lesson_1_d: 25 single-consonant signs — the building blocks of all Egyptian words
dictionary.lesson_2_d: Two-consonant signs that make writing faster and more elegant
dictionary.lesson_3_d: Three-consonant powerhouses — one sign, three sounds
dictionary.lesson_4_d: Signs that ARE the word — the picture is the meaning
dictionary.lesson_5_d: Silent classifiers that tell you what category a word belongs to
dictionary.silent_desc: This sign isn't pronounced — it's placed after a word to show its meaning category.

write.meta_desc: Type English text or Manuel de Codage transliteration and see it rendered as Egyptian hieroglyphs. Copy or share your compositions.
write.title: Write in
write.subtitle: Type text and watch it transform into ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs.
write.hint_mdc: Type MdC notation (e.g., nfr-xpr) → hieroglyphs from transliteration
write.hint_smart: Type any text — AI translates to proper Egyptian hieroglyphs
write.label_mdc: Type MdC transliteration (use - to separate signs)

explore.meta_desc: Browse 190+ Egyptian heritage sites — pyramids, temples, mosques, churches, museums, and natural wonders. Filter by category, region, or subcategory.
explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle_post: heritage sites — pyramids, temples, mosques, churches, museums, and natural wonders.
explore.upload_hint: The AI will identify which site it is from 139+ heritage sites
explore.error_503: Identification temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
explore.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

chat.meta_desc: Chat with Thoth, AI god of wisdom. Ask about hieroglyphs, pharaohs, temples, and Egyptian history.
chat.title: Ask
chat.subtitle: God of wisdom, writing & knowledge — your AI Egyptology guide
chat.welcome_body: I am Thoth, keeper of ancient wisdom. Ask me about hieroglyphs, pharaohs, temples, mythology, or the daily life of ancient Egypt.
starters: Tell me about the Great Pyramids of Giza
What was daily life like in ancient Egypt?
Tell me about the Valley of the Kings

quiz.meta_desc: Test your knowledge of ancient Egyptian heritage with our interactive quiz.
quiz.title: Egyptian Heritage
quiz.subtitle: Test your knowledge of pharaohs, pyramids, and ancient wonders
quiz.quick_desc: 10 questions from our landmark database. No AI needed.
quiz.ai_desc: Custom questions generated by Thoth. Choose category & difficulty.
quiz.verify_fail: Could not verify answer. Please try again.
